api: AWS DynamoDB JSON HTTP API (DynamoDB_20120810 protocol, X-Amz-Target header dispatch) -- not a REST API
scope: Migration of legacy's single implemented operation (DynamoDB_20120810.Scan, paginated via LastEvaluatedKey/ExclusiveStartKey), matching internal/connectors/dynamodb exactly. Other DynamoDB operations require SigV4-signed AWS JSON-RPC request construction, table-key inputs, or DynamoDB Streams CDC that this read-only native bundle does not expose. Every covered/excluded read entry below is declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST with an X-Amz-Target header for every DynamoDB JSON-protocol operation) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design SS E.1 rule 4) -- matching bing-ads's and monday's identical convention for their POST-only wire protocols. Genuine mutation/administrative operations keep their real semantics annotated in the reason text since they are excluded, not covered.

excluded.reason: Query requires caller-supplied key-condition expressions/index choices and the same SigV4 JSON-RPC body construction as Scan; legacy never exposed a query stream or config contract for these inputs
GetItem is a point lookup requiring table key attributes rather than a collection stream; legacy never exposed key-input config or a detail stream
BatchGetItem is a keyed lookup batch requiring caller-supplied keys rather than a discoverable collection stream; legacy never exposed that input contract
DescribeTable is table metadata discovery; legacy Catalog is a static single-stream constant and never issued a live DescribeTable call
PutItem requires SigV4 JSON-RPC mutation body construction and a reviewed AttributeValue write schema; this migration is read-only and legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation
UpdateItem requires expression/update semantics and SigV4 JSON-RPC mutation body construction; this migration is read-only and legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation
destructive mutation; out of scope, dynamodb is read-only in this migration
DynamoDB Streams is a distinct CDC API with shard iterator lifecycle semantics; legacy never touched it and this bundle advertises no cdc capability or CDC stub
